title: Worst Mod EVER
description: It Is A Mod With A LOT of Stuffs And Things To Mess With Like NBT Saver You Can Play For Hours And Not Get Exhausted
body:
# This Mod Has A LOT In Store For It:

<details>
<summary>Items</summary>

- Self Promo Item
- Self Promo Block
- Self Promo Ore
- Self Promo Deepslate Ore
- Starlight
- Cauliflower
- Sus Drink(🤔)
- Dirt Chisel
- NBT Saver
- Magic Block
- Self Promo Stairs
- Self Promo Slab
- Self Promo Pressure Plate
- Self Promo Door
- Self Promo Trapdoor
- Self Promo Button
- Self Promo Fence
- Self Promo Fence Gate
- Self Promo Wall
- Sus Lamp
- Self Promo Sword
- Self Promo Pickaxe
- Self Promo Axe
- Self Promo Shovel
- Self Promo Hoe
- Self Promo Hammer (mines 3x3)
- Self Promo Boots(Wearing Full Set Gives Haste 2 And Jump Boost 1 And Inf Fall Damage Protection)
- Self Promo Leggings(Wearing Full Set Gives Haste 2 And Jump Boost 1 And Inf Fall Damage Protection)
- Self Promo Chestplate(Wearing Full Set Gives Haste 2 And Jump Boost 1 And Inf Fall Damage Protection)
- Self Promo Helmet (Wearing Full Set Gives Haste 2 And Jump Boost 1 And Inf Fall Damage Protection)
- Self Promo Horse Armor


</details>
